executives.name: Candace MacGibbon
executives.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector and capital markets.

executives.name: Christopher Wallace
executives.background: Mr. Wallace is a managing partner of Firstlight Capital and has over 30 years of experience in the investment industry. He has held senior positions with several Canadian investment dealers.

executives.name: Frank Estergaard
executives.background: Chartered Professional Accountant and former partner at KPMG. Extensive experience in auditing and financial consulting for public companies.

tenure_dates.title: Director and Chair of the Audit Committee
